description_long: This is a small, rectangular, single-story commercial building with a heavily weathered, rust-colored exterior and a flat roof. The facade features a large, bold sign reading 'Rock 'n' Roll' in white, blocky letters, mounted on a raised section above the main entrance. The front wall has two small, blue-tinted windows with slatted coverings and a central, double-door entrance partially boarded up with a wooden plank. The sides of the building each have two similar windows, while the rear is solid with no visible openings. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from metal panels, giving it an industrial, aged look, and the overall design is utilitarian with minimal ornamentation.
description: A weathered, rust-colored metal musical instrument store with a flat roof, bold 'Rock 'n' Roll' signage, and boarded-up double doors. The facade features small blue windows and a rugged, industrial appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Rock 'n' Roll' sign, boarded double doors, and two blue-tinted windows.
description_view_1: Left side view with two small, slatted blue windows and the flat, rusted roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid, rusted wall with no windows or doors and the raised sign structure visible above the roofline.
description_view_3: Right side view with two small, slatted blue windows and the flat, rusted roof.
attribute_storefront_signage: A large, rectangular sign is mounted above the entrance on the front facade, displaying the text 'Rock 'n' Roll' in bold, white, sans-serif letters. The sign is integrated into a raised section of the roof, is proportionally wide, and stands out against the rusted metal background. There are no logos or decorative elements beyond the text.
attribute_entrance_door_style: The entrance consists of a central, double-door setup, partially boarded up with a wooden plank. The doors appear to be made of wood or metal, rectangular in shape, and lack visible window panels or decorative features. Handles are not clearly visible.
attribute_architectural_style: The building exhibits a utilitarian, industrial style with a flat roof, minimal ornamentation, and a heavily weathered, rusted metal facade. The design is functional and unadorned, with small, slatted windows and a prominent sign as the only distinguishing features.
